resources.string: Guardian Saathi watches over your elderly loved ones 24/7 with instant emergency alerts—even when you can\'t be there.
Get real-time updates on medicine reminders, battery status, and location. Know they\'re safe without constant phone calls
Our intelligent guardian detects scams, monitors unusual transactions, and alerts you to potential dangers
Smart protection, instant alerts, and peace of mind
I want to be cared for and maintain my independence with gentle guidance
I want to care for someone and monitor their well-being from anywhere
Ask your guardian to scan this code
Your guardian will receive a secure invitation to monitor your safety and health updates.

Hey I’m using Guardian Saathi for my safety. Can you connect as my guardian? 
Download Guardian Saathi: [Link] 

You’ll be able to stay updated on my safety and health. 
Code:
Point your camera at the QR code
You will be securely connected to monitor their safety and health updates.
Camera access is needed to scan QR codes
Not the right person? Try again
Prevents Android from stopping your protection in the background. Ensures fall detection and location work even with battery saver on.
A screen will appear asking to allow GuardianSathi to run unrestricted. Tap \"Allow\" to confirm.
This does not significantly affect your battery life. It only prevents Android from force-stopping the app.
Scans notifications from WhatsApp and SMS apps for suspicious links and phishing patterns before you accidentally open them.
In the next screen, find \"GuardianSathi\" in the list and toggle it on. Tap \"Allow\" on the confirmation popup.
We only analyze notifications for scam patterns. Your personal messages are never read or stored.
Your guardian can see your location in real time.
Required for emergency SOS and geo-fence alerts.
Your location is only shared with your trusted guardian. We never share it with anyone else.
Protection even when app is closed
Geo-fence alerts work even when GuardianSathi is in the background.
Your guardian is notified if you leave a safe area at any time.
Background location is only used for safety monitoring and is never sold or shared.
Receive medicine reminders and health check-in alerts on time.
Your guardian can send you urgent messages instantly.
We only send notifications that matter to your safety and health.
Detects sudden falls and immediately alerts your guardian.
Monitors movement patterns to identify unusual stillness after a fall.
Motion data is processed on your device and never uploaded to any server.
Scans incoming messages for known scam and phishing patterns.
Alerts your guardian before you accidentally respond to a fraud.
Your messages are scanned locally on your device. We never read or store your personal SMS.
Detect scam calls in real time
Identifies incoming calls from known scam and fraud numbers.
Your guardian is alerted when a suspicious call is received.
Call data is only used for scam detection and is never stored or shared.
Analyzes call history to detect repeated contact from fraud numbers.
Helps your guardian understand unusual calling patterns over time.
Call history is analyzed locally and only flagged entries are shared with your guardian.
Allows SOS and fall detection alerts to appear on your screen even when the phone is locked or another app is open.
In the next screen, find \"GuardianSathi\" and toggle \"Allow full screen intents\" on.
This is only used for critical safety alerts. GuardianSathi will never use this to show advertisements or unnecessary popups.
Did you fall? Guardian will be alerted in 10 seconds
